summary: Iteration 3 - Profile Redesign Testing Complete. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All QuizUp-style profile features verified - personal profile, player profile, hero cards, action buttons, follow toggle, logout.
critical_code_review_comments: Profile endpoint correctly returns followers_count, following_count, country, country_flag
Player public profile endpoint provides complete data with is_following state
Country flag mapping covers major countries with emoji flags
Categories data includes level, XP, title, and XP progress for each topic
Action buttons (Jouer/Suivre/Message) correctly hidden for own profile (isOwnProfile check)
Follow toggle updates follower count immediately in UI via optimistic updates
test_credentials: Test users: ProfileTest_*, FollowTest_* (created during testing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile pages fully redesigned with QuizUp-style layout. Personal profile (profile.tsx) has hero card, stats row, MES THEMES grid, STATISTIQUES, MES TITRES, HISTORIQUE sections. Player profile (player-profile.tsx) has hero card, action buttons (hidden for own profile), SES THEMES, PUBLICATIONS. Backend endpoints /api/profile/{id} and /api/player/{id}/profile return all required fields including followers_count, following_count, country, country_flag.

tests: Returns categories with level, XP, xp_progress for series_tv, geographie, histoire
Returns basic info (id, pseudo, avatar_seed, selected_title)
Returns categories with level and xp

features_verified: Hero card with avatar ring (letter inside)
Country + flag display for users with country
MES THÈMES grid with colorful category cards (📺 Séries TV, 🌍 Géographie, 🏛️ Histoire)
NiV. level indicators with XP progress bars
STATISTIQUES section (Victoires, Win Rate, Best Streak, XP Total)
MES TITRES section with selectable title chips
Logout button - redirects to registration page
Action buttons visible for other players: ⚡Jouer, +Suivre, 💬Message
Action buttons HIDDEN for own profile
SES THÈMES grid with colorful category cards
PUBLICATIONS section with posts or empty state
Button changes back ✓ Suivi → Suivre on unfollow

test_categories.profile_endpoint: 7 tests - followers_count, following_count, country, country_flag, categories, win_rate, 404
test_categories.player_profile_endpoint: 6 tests - basic info, country/flag, follower counts, is_following, categories, posts
test_categories.country_flag: 2 tests - known country flag, default flag for unknown

key_validations: Personal profile displays all QuizUp-style elements correctly
Player profile shows action buttons for other players
Player profile hides action buttons for own profile
Follow/Unfollow toggle works with immediate UI update
